summary: www.jobs.abbott - OTP entry fields appear as drop-downs
description:
Created attachment 9605024
OPT input field issue Nightly vs Chrome

**Environment:**
Operating system: Windows
Firefox version: Firefox 152.0.1 (release) / Firefox Nightly 154.0a1 (2026-07-06)

**Preconditions:**
- Clean profile

**Steps to reproduce:**
1. Navigate to: https://www.jobs.abbott/us/en/apply?jobSeqNo=ABLAUS31152679ENUSEXTERNAL&step=1&stepname=applicantAcknowledgment
2. Enter an email address (e.g "test34@mail.com") in the Email input field
3. Click the "Get OPT" button
4. Observe the OPT entry fields 

**Expected Behavior:**
The OPT entry fields are rendered accordingly and the introduced numbers are displayed accordingly

**Actual Behavior:**
OTP entry fields appear as drop-downs and the introduced numbers are not displayed 

**Notes:**
- Reproducible on the latest Firefox Release and Nightly
- Reproducible regardless of the ETP setting
- Works as expected using Chrome

---

summary: www.centuryasia.com.tw - "Member Login" pop-up window fails to load
description:
Created attachment 9587194
"Member Login" pop-up window Nightly vs Chrome

**Environment:**
Operating system: Windows
Firefox version: Firefox 150.0.3 (release) / Firefox Nightly 152.0a1 (2026-05-17) 

**Preconditions:**
- Clean profile

**Steps to reproduce:**
1. Navigate to: https://www.centuryasia.com.tw/login.html?obj=l&obj1=i&ver=I+DfKKUJFcA=#login
2. Notice the missing  "Member Login" pop-up window
3. Click "Member Login" button
4. Observe the page

**Expected Behavior:**
"Member Login" pop-up window is displayed accordingly on page load and when clicking the "Member Login" button

**Actual Behavior:**
"Member Login" pop-up window fails to load on page load and when clicking the "Member Login" button

**Notes:**
- Reproducible on the latest Firefox Release and Nightly
- Reproducible regardless of the ETP setting
- Works as expected using Chrome

---

summary: drmeth.com - Layout is broken, elements are overlapped and not scaled properly in the center of the page
description:
Created attachment 9604208
image.png

**Environment:**
Operating system: Linux/Windows 10
Firefox version: Firefox 136.0 (release)/152/154

**Preconditions:**
- Clean profile

**Steps to reproduce:**
1. Navigate to: https://drmeth.com/
2. Observe the page.

**Expected Behavior:**
The elements are displayed correctly.

**Actual Behavior:**
Elements are overlapped and not scaled properly in the center of the page.

**Notes:**
- Reproducible on the latest Firefox Release and Nightly
- Reproducible regardless of the ETP setting
- Works as expected using Chrome
